$schema: Curated tail-risk hedge basket for Ballast v1. Weights sum to 1.0. Each market is a Jupiter Prediction Market with NO-side ask < 0.5 (otherwise the hedge is too expensive to make sense at small order sizes).

markets.thesis: BTC > $80k by EOY 2026 — buying NO is a hedge against a deep crypto drawdown.
BTC > $150k by EOY 2026 — buying NO at low premium ($0.11) reflects most of the downside without large capital lockup.
BTC > $90k by EOY 2026 — closer-to-spot bullish strike; NO at ~$0.46 prices the market roughly even.
Short-dated daily Up/Down for ETH — small allocation to test rapid resolution + claim flow during demos. Replace with the next live market when this one resolves.
Short-dated daily Up/Down for BTC — same role as the ETH one.
